name: American State Bank & Trust Company Of Williston
description_short: FDIC-insured community bank in Williston, ND offering personal checking/savings, business loans, personal loans, and trust services with local decision-making.
description_long: American State Bank & Trust Company of Williston is a traditional community bank operating in North Dakota with FDIC insurance backing. The institution positions itself as a locally-focused financial partner emphasizing personal relationships and quick decision-making for both consumer and business customers. The bank offers a comprehensive suite of banking products including personal checking accounts (Performance Plus Checking), personal loans, business loans with flexible terms, and trust/retirement planning services. They provide cash management solutions for businesses including ACH payments, payroll distribution, remote deposit capture (RDC), and Positive Pay fraud prevention. Consumer services include online banking, loan payment portals, VISA card products, and mineral management services. They also offer financial calculators and rate transparency tools on their website. ASB&T distinguishes itself through local decision-making for loans, allowing customers to work with community-based loan officers rather than automated systems. The bank emphasizes personalized service and customizable lending packages. They offer business-specific services like card payment processing and comprehensive cash management that smaller banks often lack. Their trust services and retirement planning represent additional specialization beyond basic banking. As a regional community bank, ASB&T serves primarily Williston, ND and surrounding areas. While they provide competitive rates and local expertise, their geographic limitation and smaller scale mean fewer branch locations and potentially higher fees than national banks. Their website demonstrates standard banking functionality but limited digital innovation compared to neobanks. The bank is best suited for local Williston businesses and residents valuing personal relationships over digital-first banking.
services: Lines of credit for business growth
ACH payment processing for vendors and payroll
Remote deposit capture (RDC) for business checks
pros: FDIC-insured deposits backed by full faith and credit of U.S. Government
Local loan decision-making eliminates corporate bureaucracy and enables faster approvals
Comprehensive business services including cash management, ACH, payroll distribution, and Positive Pay fraud protection
Remote deposit capture (RDC) allows businesses to scan and deposit checks from office
Specialized trust services, retirement planning, and mineral management services available
Performance Plus checking designed with flexibility for busy consumers
120-day deferred payment option on recreational summer loans
Customizable commercial lending packages tailored to specific business needs
cons: Limited geographic footprint restricted to Williston, ND area—not suitable for customers needing multi-state access
Website provides minimal transparency on specific interest rates, fees, or account minimums
No mention of mobile app capabilities or advanced digital banking features compared to modern banks
Limited information about personal loan amounts, terms, or APR ranges available
Smaller institution means potentially fewer ATM locations and branch options than national banks
best_for: Small to mid-sized businesses in Williston area needing personalized lending and cash management
Williston residents seeking traditional banking with local relationship management
Business owners prioritizing ACH, payroll processing, and fraud prevention services
Customers valuing local decision-making and personalized service over digital-first banking
diagnosis: American State Bank & Trust is best for Williston-area residents and small business owners who value personalized service and local decision-making over digital convenience and competitive rates available at national banks. The primary caveat is geographic restriction—this bank only meaningfully serves the Williston, ND region and is not suitable for customers requiring multi-state or national banking access.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
fdic_official_name: American State Bank & Trust Company of Williston
